name: Create Product Attributes
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can enrich product information and improve product differentiation through Product Attributes in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which enable defining custom product characteristics like size, color, material, or other specifications. This attribute capability helps retail operators organize product variations and enhance product descriptions, with effective attribute use typically improving product searchability and supporting better inventory organization across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Attribute configuration in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to create structured product characteristics supporting detailed product descriptions, variant management, and enhanced product filtering. This attribute system helps ensure your retail operations can maintain detailed product information supporting customer service, inventory organization, and effective product presentation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Attributes are identifying characteristics applied to your products for improved categorisation, searching, and reporting. Retail Express includes a range of default Attributes, and Custom Attributes can be created as required."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "There are two kinds of Product Attributes:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Type", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Default attribute", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Standard attributes included in Retail Express by default are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Brand"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Colour"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Season"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Size"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These cannot be edited or removed, however, you can create, delete, and edit any associated attribute values. For example, the attribute "Colour" cannot be removed, however, you can add/remove the value "Blue" or not enter any Colour attribute values at all."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Attributes", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Both Attributes and Attribute Values can be created, deleted, and edited. The system supports up to 8 Custom Attributes."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-d943d5eb"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a Custom Attribute"}], "data-id": "create-a-custom-attribute"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Product Attributes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the Attribute name directly into the "}, {"text": "Create New Attribute", "bold": true}, {"text": " field (you can enter up to 64 characters)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Insert", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The new Attribute will be added and displayed in the Attribute list on the page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240611at30112AM.05TJ10000047FssMAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Screenshot20240611at30112AM.05TJ10000047FssMAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 900, "height": 482}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Attribute is also added as an available field on the "}, {"text": "Edit Product screen"}, {"text": " and various reports within the System."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Custom attributes are currently not available in any APIs (e.g., Web Store API, Warehouse Management API, Inventory Planning API etc) or "}, {"text": "Offline POS"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "The ability to access Product Attributes is determined by the "}, {"text": "User Security Profile ", "bold": true}, {"text": "setting "Product Attributes". You are limited to creating 8 custom attributes (if using"}, {"text": " Franchise Connect"}, {"text": " this will be 4 Global Attributes and 4 Franchisee Attributes). If you cannot access this feature please contact your company administrative staff."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Quick Create Product from POS"}], "data-id": "quick-create-product-from-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create New Attributes On The Fly", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Back-office users can conveniently create attribute values within the POS Product Create page. This enhancement extends to all attributes, including custom types on the "additional details" page, and product types."}, {"text": "

When products are associated the trash can icon is greyed out to indicate the product cannot be deleted."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Products column displays the number of products using each Attribute Value."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To delete an Attribute Value:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Trash can ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A prompt will be displayed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "OK ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to confirm"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "To delete an Attribute Value you will need to update the products so they're no longer using that value. Refer to the "}, {"text": "Create or Edit Products by Mass Download"}, {"text": " article for more information. {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have created a Custom Attribute you can configure the system to print this value on Invoices and Receipts."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The first time you enable Custom Attributes to print on Receipts you will be required to re-run and update the Retail Express Hardware Utility. "}, {"text": "Click here"}, {"text": " for step-by-step instructions."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To update the display settings for the Attributes:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > POS Settings > Invoice and Receipt Settings", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Display Product Attributes on Invoice ", "bold": true}, {"text": "field"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the Attributes as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat the steps for the "}, {"text": "Display Product Attributes on Receipt", "bold": true}, {"text": " field"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to save the changes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the Attribute has been assigned to a product on the invoice/receipt the Attribute will be displayed below the Product Description and SKU:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/473-create-product-attributes#custom-attribute-search", "children": [{"text": "Can I search for products in POS using the Custom Attributes?"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ability to search and view Custom Attributes at POS is on roadmap for a future release. Existing Default Attributes are able to be searched and viewed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/473-create-product-attributes#synchronise-list-order", "children": [{"text": "Controlling the order Sizes appear online (List Order)"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Unlike other Attributes, which are sorted alphabetically, the Size Attribute also includes a "}, {"text": "List Order. ", "bold": true}, {"text": "This allows you to specify a particular order for your sizes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The"}, {"text": " List Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " affects the display of Sizes in:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reports (when sorted by the Size column)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search options and drop-down menus"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Online (when using an integrated web store)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "List Order details can be entered at the time of creation of a Size, or edited and maintained afterwards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To synchronise your sizes in a particular order with the web integration you will just need to enter the List Order details for sizes using either the individual or bulk edit methods described above. This information is then sent from Retail Express during the next synchronisation."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you are using a custom-built integration using the eCommerce API you will need to confirm with your developers if this functionality has been implemented."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/473-create-product-attributes#attribute-characters", "children": [{"text": "What characters can I use in my attribute names?"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Attribute names are limited to letters and numbers, as well as the following charactes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "_ (underscore)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "- (hyphen)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "/ (forward slash)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "+ (plus)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ". (full stop)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
